KatamApps respects the privacy concerns of all users.

Thus, we at KatamApps have created this Privacy Policy to demonstrate our commitment to your privacy. The following reveals our information gathering and dissemination practices. By accessing and/or using KatamApps website you are accepting the practices described in this privacy policy.We want our users to always be aware of any information we collect, how we use it, and under what circumstances, if any, we disclose it.
